items.summary: Read bounded facts about the active After Effects project.
items.sideEffectSummary: Reads project state without modifying it.

examples.summary: Read a bounded summary when no project content exists.
Return a typed unavailable error before native dispatch.

items.summary: Read the open After Effects project's bit depth.
items.sideEffectSummary: Reads project bit depth without changing After Effects state.
preconditions: An After Effects project must be open.

examples.summary: Read the project bits per channel.
Require an open project before reading bit depth.

items.summary: Set the open After Effects project's bit depth.
items.sideEffectSummary: Changes project bit depth and creates one After Effects Undo step.
preconditions: An After Effects project must be open.
targetDepth must differ from the current project bit depth.

examples.summary: Change the project from 8 to 16 bits per channel.
Reject a target that already matches the project bit depth.

items.summary: List a bounded page of items in the open After Effects project.
items.sideEffectSummary: Reads project items without changing After Effects state.
preconditions: An After Effects project must be open.

examples.summary: List the first bounded page of an empty project.
Require an open project before listing items.

items.summary: List a bounded page of layers in one After Effects composition.
items.sideEffectSummary: Reads composition layers without changing After Effects state.
preconditions: An After Effects project must be open.

examples.summary: List the first bounded page of an empty composition.
Refresh a stale composition locator before listing layers.
List an empty selected-layer page for a composition.
Refresh a stale composition locator before listing selected layers.

preconditions: An After Effects project must be open.
items.sideEffectSummary: Reads selected composition layers without changing After Effects state.
items.summary: List a bounded page of selected layers in one After Effects composition.
Read the current time of one After Effects composition.
items.sideEffectSummary: Reads composition time without changing After Effects state.
preconditions: An After Effects project must be open.

examples.summary: Read an exact rational current time from a composition.
Refresh a stale composition locator before reading current time.

items.summary: List a bounded page of direct properties on an After Effects layer or property group.
items.sideEffectSummary: Reads layer properties and safe primitive values without changing After Effects state.
preconditions: An After Effects project must be open.
parentPropertyLocator must come from ae.layer.properties.list@1 for the same layer.

examples.summary: List the first bounded page of direct properties on a layer.
Refresh stale layer and property locators before listing properties.
